EmailTemplate.description: Timeline valuation variant of template 09 for Wain Homes applications. 4-timeframe agent table (Open Market / 6-8W / 4-6W / 2-4W) + matching NHS Recommendation block.
EmailTemplate.name: 10 - Valuation Figure Return (Timeline)
EmailTemplate.subject: Valuation Recommendations - {{{Opportunity.Property_Address__c}}}
